title: Feedback - send a Bug feedback with names/email
scenario: Bug feedback submitted via App Settings > Feedback does not include user's name and email
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to App Settings.
Select Feedback from the App Settings menu.
Choose the Bug option from the feedback type selection.
Enter a description of the bug in the text field.
Enter the user's name in the Name field.
Enter the user's email address in the Email field.
Tap the Send button to submit the feedback.
expected: Feedback is sent with the user's name and email attached to the submission.
